description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the alpine Docker image and defines a single deploy stage. Add a pages job that runs in the deploy stage, executes the shell commands "apk add --update --no-cache make" and "make deploy_to_pages", and publishes the public/ directory as an artifact that expires after 2 months. Configure the job to run only on the main branch or any tag of the chusiang/wiki.drx.tw project, targeting GitLab Pages for deployment.
